privileged_info_summary: The task exports Nx Witness VMS configuration data to JSON. The system uses Nx Witness VMS (real, open-source software from Network Optix) deployed in a test environment at https://localhost:7001. The task requires querying REST API endpoints (/rest/v1/system/info, /rest/v1/servers, /rest/v1/devices, /rest/v1/users, /rest/v1/layouts, /rest/v1/rules, /rest/v1/system/settings) and exporting responses into a structured JSON file with metadata, systemInfo, servers, devices, users, layouts, eventRules, and systemSettings sections. The test data includes 5 virtual cameras (Parking Lot, Entrance, Server Room, Lobby, Loading Dock cameras) and 6 users (admin, security.operator, camera.admin, site.manager, john.smith, sarah.jones). The system name is 'GymAnythingVMS'. API authentication uses bearer tokens obtained from /rest/v1/login/sessions endpoint with admin/Admin1234! credentials.
